title.en: Cadmium Selenide CdSe — Quantum Dot Size vs Colour
title.ko: 셀렌화 카드뮴 CdSe — 양자점 크기 vs 색

subtitle.en: bulk CdSe is dark red (Eg 1.74 eV); shrink to a 2-nm nanocrystal and Eg climbs to 2.7 eV — the same crystal glows green-to-orange across the visible just by changing size
subtitle.ko: 벌크 CdSe는 어두운 적색(Eg 1.74 eV); 2 nm로 축소하면 Eg 2.7 eV — 같은 결정이 크기만으로 녹·황·적 형광

description.en: Nine CdSe dots from 2 to 10 nm, each emitting at its size-tuned wavelength. Slider picks the active dot; large swatch shows the colour and Eg formula displays.
description.ko: 2~10 nm CdSe 점 9개, 각자 크기 맞춤 형광. 슬라이더로 활성 점 선택; 큰 swatch에 색 표시.
